titleStmt.title: SII 9.186: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 186. (A.R. No. 277 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE COURT-YARD OF THE ISVARA TEMPLE AT GUDIHALLI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 36, Pushya, śu. 11, Ādivāra, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti probably corresponding to A.D. 1111 December 12 Tuesday (not Sunday, as stated, Uttarāyaṇa-sankrānti occured on December 25 Monday. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva whose feudatory Tribhuvanamalla-Pāṇḍyadēva was ruling over Noḷambavāḍi thirtytwo-thousand. The Mahāsāmanta Siṅgarasa of the Vināyaka family, son of Kāmarasa and Chaṭṭabbe, is stated to have made a gift of land for the service of the god Noḷambēśvara, for feeding ascetics and for education. The gift was made after washing the feet of Varēśvara-Paṇḍita, disciple of Vāmaśakti-Paṇḍita who was the disciple of Divyaśakti-Paṇḍita.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgasira(ḥ)ścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhā
ya saṁbhavē . śrīparamana padakamaḷamanaṁ pottu smaraṇemārpa pūjipa bageyiṁ
byāpakanoḍagūḍuva niṣṭhāparateya divyaśaktipaṁḍitadēvaru . gaṇapatyāya namaḥ .
Ivara hritpadmadoḷudayade paramananatyaṁtasūkṣmanaṁ vyāpakanaṁ sthira
neyi yōgadoḷiradeydida vāmasaktipaṇḍitadēvaru . duritēbhēṁdrakaṭhōra
kuṁbhadaḷanaṁ śrīghanavaktrōgrasatkarasākhāṁkuradharmmanirmmaḷaguṇaṁ paṁcēṁdri
yaprauḍhataskarasāmūhabhayaṁkaraṁ prabaḷaśaucācārasīḷaṁ varēsvaradēva
prabhunāmadhēyanesedaṁ viśvaṁbharācakradoḷ . svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ
mahārājādhirāja paramēsvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābha
raṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁ
drārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire © tatpādapadmōpajīvi svasti samasta prasastisahitaṁ
śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ tribhuvanamallapāṇḍyadēvaru noḻaṁbavāḍi mūvattircchā
siramumaṁ duṣṭanigrahavisiṣṭapratipālanadiṁdāḻuttamire tatpā
dapadmārādhakarappa bāyara vaṁsānvaya . benegaṁgavātmasajjanavenisu
va sōvabbegaṁ dharitrītaḷadoḻu jalanidhiya sippinoḷagaṇinanupamamauktika
me puṭṭuvaṁdadinogedaṁ . kūroḷu subhagaṁ kuḷavadhu vārijamukhi mādiya
bbegaṁ puṭṭidanī dhāriṇige kalpavrikṣamudāraguṇaṁ mārasiṁganāhavadhīra . dhīraṁ
noḻaṁbagavuṁḍanudāraṁ sale cimmikabbegaṁ sakaḷaguṇādhāranene bhūpanudiyi
si dhāriṇiyalu negaḷdanalte kāyvara gaṇḍa . būpaṁgaṁ kulavadhuvī sōvabbega
muditakīrtti puṭṭuva teṟadiṁdī vasudheyalavatarisida kā
manripaṁ puṇisegāṁkanene pogaḻadarāru . kaṭṭāḷu puṇisegaṁ kulavadhu ca
ṭṭabbegameṁṭunūṟakkadhipatiyāgalu puṭṭida kuṇaṁgilunāḷkaṁ neṭṭane
sāmantasiṁganurvvītaḷadoḷu . svasti sumadhigatapaṁcamahāsabda ma
hāsāmantaṁ vijeyalakṣmīkāntaṁ nijavijeyabhujādaṇḍaṁ prajemeccegaṇḍaṁ
vināyakanāmānvayakuḷapradīpaṁ sauryyapratāpanīsvaravara
prasādaṁ dānavinōdaṁ dāyigakudharakuḷisadaṇḍaṁ peṟagepaḷiva
ragaṇḍaṁ nīticāṇākyanēkavākyaṁ vairimanōbhaṁganayyanasiṅghaṁ mārkkōlaba
ṟasiḍilu nāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāsāmantaṁ
siṁgarasaṁ svasti śrīmaccāḷukyavikramavaṣada 36 neya kharasaṁ
vatsarada puṣya suddha 11 yādivāramumuttarāyaṇasaṁkrānti
yuṁ vyatīpātamuṁ kūḍidaṁdu śrīmannoḷaṁbēsvaradēvaraṁgabhō
gakkaṁ snānanivēdyakkaṁ tapōdhanarggaṁ vidyādānakkaṁ tribhōgamāgi sva
sti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhāṇaparā
yaṇajapasamādhisīlaguṇasaṁpannarappa śrīmadu varēsva
rapaṇḍitadēvara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi piriyake
ṟeya keḷage biṭṭa tōṁṭa keṟeya keḷage gardde
mattarmmālākāraṁ māda Antu gardde
mattaru hagareyiṁda ponnabbeya
ha keya mo beddale
matta 2 kṣētra
ponne
lu kaṭṭisi caturvvēda rappa
brāhmaṇarumaṁ kavileymanaḷida mahāpātakamakku . sāmānyōyaṁdharmma
sēturnripāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ Ētāni ṣaḍbhāginaḥ pā
rtthivēṁdrān bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . svada
vā yō harēta vasuṁdhara . ṣaṣṭirvvariṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāya
tē krimiḥ . Ārānuṁ biṭṭaridaṁ biḍatīradenalu vēda tane biṭṭaṁ
sāradharmmamida kaivāradi kaikoṇḍu rakṣisuttirkke
Digital edition of SII 9.186 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
